summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of ProtoVillage Phase 1 - Graamam Connect Orders page. All backend APIs and frontend functionality verified successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/graamam/orders returns 8 seeded orders with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/graamam/orders?status=X filters correctly (new=3, packing=4, dispatched=1, delivered=2)
Backend: POST /api/graamam/orders creates new order with auto-generated GC-XXXX ID
Backend: POST with invalid status returns 400
Frontend: Page loads with all components (sidebar, topbar, title, create button, pill tabs, table)
Frontend: Table renders seeded rows with correct data (Order ID, Customer, Items, Date, Total, Status, Action)
Frontend: Pill tabs filter table correctly by status
Frontend: Create Order dialog opens, accepts input, creates order, switches to correct tab, and closes
Frontend: Theme toggle switches between light/dark mode and persists across page reloads
Frontend: Row expand/collapse reveals/hides order details (Order, Customer, Fulfillment sections)
Frontend: Sidebar Orders nav item shows active state with badge count
Frontend: Only / route exists (Phase 1 constraint verified - /inventory shows blank)
Design: Light mode matches Stitch UI kit with correct colors and spacing
Design: Dark mode uses OLED black background with proper contrast
Design: Fonts use Raleway for headings per Modern Humanist palette
Design: Primary colors match design system (#1e6a72 for primary-container)
